comment: Expansion #4 Step-2 pilot, shape E (list-of-parents). Transcribed VERBATIM from scraper_firearmsdepot.py inline PARENT_PATHS on 2026-06-14 — parity-proven byte-identical before flip. This scraper does NOT map caliber->URL: it crawls the three usage-type parent categories and buckets each product by normalize_caliber (no per-caliber static URLs exist; FD's caliber filtering is hash-based JS that breaks ?page=N pagination). So there is no `calibers` block — the parents live in `parent_paths`, loaded by load_parent_paths(). No `type` tags added (the inline literal carried none — zero new data). Not yet harness-validated; validation null until Step-3. Approved by Jon, Step-2 pilot, 2026-06-14.
